instructions: This is a Bun + Turborepo monorepo. The backend is Convex (packages/backend/convex): flag missing auth checks, unvalidated args, missing return validators, unindexed queries, and unbounded .collect() on tables that can grow. The frontend is React 19 + TanStack Start + TanStack Query (apps/web): flag SSR-unsafe code, hook misuse, and missing route loaders for suspense queries. Do not leave nitpicks, praise, or style comments; Biome handles formatting.
